name: Wheat
description: Russia and Ukraine account for ~28% of global wheat exports. Black Sea Grain Initiative collapse caused price spike.
war_disruption: Russia-Ukraine war disrupted 20-25% of global wheat supply.

name: Corn (Maize)
description: Ukraine exports ~16% of global corn. War disrupted Black Sea shipping routes.
war_disruption: Ukraine corn exports reduced ~30% since 2022 invasion.

name: Sunflower Oil
description: Ukraine + Russia control 75% of global sunflower oil exports. Most conflict-exposed commodity.
war_disruption: Ukraine sunflower oil exports disrupted for 6+ months in 2022.

name: Fertilizer (Urea)
description: Russia is world's largest fertilizer exporter. Sanctions and logistics disruptions spiked prices.
war_disruption: Russia fertilizer exports sanctioned/disrupted. Global food production risk.

name: Natural Gas
description: Russia was 40% of EU gas supply. Conflict caused energy crisis and indirectly raised food production costs.
war_disruption: Russia cut gas to EU. Industrial food production costs spiked.
